title: Software Engineer Intern
description:
**About AI Startup Impact** 




 AI Startup Impact is India's leading platform dedicated to AI startup news, funding updates, founder stories, emerging innovations, and ecosystem insights. Our mission is to connect founders, investors, builders, and AI enthusiasts through impactful content, industry coverage, and community\\-driven initiatives.
 



 As we continue to scale our platform and products, we are looking for passionate Software Engineer Interns who are eager to build real\\-world applications, solve meaningful problems, and contribute to the growth of the AI startup ecosystem.
 



  





**Role Overview** 




 We are seeking a highly motivated Software Engineer Intern to join our engineering team. You will work closely with product, design, and content teams to build scalable web applications, automation tools, and AI\\-powered features that enhance the experience of our growing community.
 



 This internship offers hands\\-on exposure to modern web technologies, startup operations, and AI\\-driven product development.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 



* Develop and maintain responsive web applications and platform features.
* Build and integrate RESTful APIs and third\\-party services.
* Collaborate with designers and product teams to transform ideas into functional products.
* Assist in developing AI\\-powered tools, automation workflows, and internal dashboards.
* Write clean, maintainable, and well\\-documented code.
* Participate in code reviews, debugging, testing, and performance optimization.
* Work with databases and backend systems to ensure data accuracy and reliability.
* Research and experiment with emerging AI technologies and developer tools.
* Support platform improvements, feature launches, and product enhancements.



  





**Required Skills \\& Qualifications** 



* Pursuing or recently completed a Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, or a related field.
* Basic knowledge of JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, or similar programming languages.
* Familiarity with React.js, Next.js, Node.js, or modern web development frameworks.
* Understanding of databases such as PostgreSQL, MySQL, or MongoDB.
* Knowledge of Git, GitHub, and software development best practices.
* Strong problem\\-solving and analytical thinking skills.
* Ability to learn quickly and adapt in a fast\\-paced startup environment.
* Good communication and collaboration skills.



  





**Preferred Qualifications** 



* Experience with AI tools, APIs, or machine learning projects.
* Familiarity with cloud platforms such as AWS, Google Cloud, or Vercel.
* Knowledge of Supabase, Firebase, Docker, or modern backend technologies.
* Experience building personal projects, hackathon projects, or open\\-source contributions.



  





**What You'll Gain** 



* Hands\\-on experience working in a fast\\-growing AI media and technology startup.
* Opportunity to build products used by founders, investors, and AI professionals.
* Mentorship from experienced founders and engineers.
* Exposure to AI startup ecosystems, emerging technologies, and product development.
* Certificate of Internship and potential full\\-time opportunities based on performance.



  





**Location** 




 Remote / Hybrid
 



  





**Internship Duration** 




 3–6 Months
 



  





**Stipend** 




 Performance\\-based stipend (to be discussed during the interview process).
 



  





**Equal Opportunity** 




 AI Startup Impact is an equal opportunity organization. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all team members.

title: Software Test Engineer (Wi-Fi)
description:
**Company Description** 




  





**Arista Networks** 
 is an industry leader in data\\-driven, client\\-to\\-cloud networking for large data center, campus and routing environments. Arista is a well\\-established and profitable company with over $8 billion in revenue. Arista’s award\\-winning platforms, ranging in Ethernet speeds up to 800G bits per second, redefine scalability, agility, and resilience. Arista is a founding member of the Ultra Ethernet consortium. We have shipped over 20 million cloud networking ports worldwide with CloudVision and EOS, an advanced network operating system. Arista is committed to open standards, and its products are available worldwide directly and through partners.
 



 At Arista, we value the diversity of thought and perspectives each employee brings. We believe fostering an inclusive environment where individuals from various backgrounds and experiences feel welcome is essential for driving creativity and innovation.
 



 Our commitment to excellence has earned us several prestigious awards, such as the Great Place to Work Survey for Best Engineering Team and Best Company for Diversity, Compensation, and Work\\-Life Balance. At Arista, we take pride in our track record of success and strive to maintain the highest quality and performance standards in everything we do.
 



  





**Who You’ll Work With** 




  





 Arista Networks is aggressively expanding its campus portfolio and Wi\\-Fi is one of the key focus areas. To be able to take Arista Wi\\-Fi to its next level, we are seeking an experienced, dynamic and hands\\-on engineer for our Chennai office who can collaborate with the existing SysTest teams based out of India.You will work with software development engineers, hardware engineers, field support engineers, product managers, and software test engineers to analyse customer requirements and use cases, gather technical details, create software test plans, and validate that the product meets our customer’s requirements. You will also work with our customer support and engineering teams to help address escalated customer issues by reproducing, and debugging those in the lab.
 



  





**What You’ll Do** 




  





 As we expand our Wi\\-Fi into campuses with diverse \\& complex deployments, varied use case scenarios and mission critical requirements, there will be a constant need for doing things differently and in a unique way. We are looking for a few engineers who will help establish our rock solid quality in campuses and enterprises with Wi\\-Fi products and thus help expand the customer base. The engineer will have a lot of varied responsibilities, ranging from solution based feature/functionality testing to handling customer deployment issues or escalations.
 



  




* Understand the Arista Wi\\-Fi cloud architecture, its components, and related products.
* Work with software development, test engineers and field support engineers to gather technical requirements, participate in functional specification and software design reviews, and validate that the product meets our customers’ requirements.
* “Own” the feature and product; be the subject matter expert for your deliverables.
* Be the first point of contact for field escalations. Reproduce the issue locally and drive them to a resolution by coordinating with Account, TAC, SysTest \\& Development teams.
* Build and maintain Wi\\-Fi labs. The person will be responsible for designing \\& deploying complex networks that mimic customer environments at scale.
* Test out end to end solutions that encompass wired and wireless deployments.
* Interop testing between Arista APs and enterprise grade Clients and custom Wi\\-Fi equipment



  





**Qualifications** 




  




* Bachelor’s/Master's degree in Electrical, Electronics, Computer Science, IT or a related field.
* 5 \\- 15 years of experience in troubleshooting wired or wireless networks and debugging complex software; experience with Cloud and virtualization technologies a plus.
* Knowledge with hands\\-on experience of the following W\\-iFi technologies is mandatory.
* RF and L1 intricacies
* Wi\\-Fi 7, Wi\\-Fi 6E, Wi\\-Fi 6
* Enterprise Access Point features.For e.g. Tunneling data path traffic.
* Hands on experience with designing and implementing Wi\\-Fi labs at scale.
* Strong troubleshooting and debugging skills.
* Proven expertise in creating test methodologies and writing test plans.
* Solid knowledge of networking fundamentals across the OSI stack is a must.
* Strong knowledge with Linux systems and networking tools.
* Basic knowledge of RESTful APIs, JSON, and SQL would be an added advantage.
* Excellent written and oral English communication skills.

title: Senior Software Engineer
description:
**Role: Senior Member of Technical Staff (C\\#, Distributed systems)**




 Location: Chennai (Hybrid)
 



  





**We are Omnissa!** 




 The world is evolving fast, and organizations everywhere—from corporations to schools—are under immense pressure to provide flexible, work\\-from\\-anywhere solutions. They need IT infrastructure that empowers employees and customers to access applications from any device, on any cloud, all while maintaining top\\-tier security. That’s where Omnissa comes in.
 



 The Omnissa Platform is the first AI\\-driven digital work platform that enables smart, seamless and secure work experiences from anywhere. It uniquely integrates multiple industry\\-leading solutions including Unified Endpoint Management, Virtual Apps and Desktops, Digital Employee Experience, and Security \\& Compliance through common data, identity, administration, and automation services. Built on the vision of autonomous workspaces \\- self configuring, self\\-healing, and self\\-securing \\- Omnissa continuously adapts to the way people work; delivering personalized and engaging employee experiences, while optimizing security, IT operations and costs. we're experiencing rapid growth—and this is just the beginning of our journey!
 



 At Omnissa, we’re driven by a shared mission to maximize value for our customers. Our five Core Values guide us: Act in Alignment, Build Trust, Foster Inclusiveness, Drive Efficiency, and Maximize Customer Value—all with the aim of achieving shared success for our clients and our team.
 



 As a global private company with over 4,000 employees, we’re always looking for passionate, talented individuals to join us. If you're ready to make an impact and help shape the future of work, we’d love to hear from you!
 



  





**What is the opportunity?:** 




  





**Workspace ONE** 
 is a digital workspace platform that simply and securely delivers and manages any app on any device by integrating access control, application management and multi\\-platform endpoint management. It is available as a cloud service or for on\\-premises deployment.
 



 Our goal is to enable Workspace One\\-Unified End point Management platform to scale and manage billions of devices across various operating system platforms and device types.
 



  





 As part of the UEM Platform team you will be involved in writing code, design and development of scalable software. You will be owning engineering initiatives and champion a culture of high ownership, continuous improvement, and engineering excellence.
 



  





**Success in the Role: What are the performance goals over the first 6\\-12 months you will work toward completing?** 



* You will need to produce software design and execute them for new use cases for various platform business.
* You will need to produce design to scale the current system.
* You will be regularly evaluated on the quality of the product you create and the code you write to ensure continued advancement of your technical skills in an environment that looks to expand them.
* You will have to collaboratively work across other teams, design and contribute code to their code bases.
* You will look at the product as a whole and look for code/design/architecture gaps, scalability/usability/supportability challenges and propose/implement solutions for the identified gaps.



  





**What type of work will I be doing? What assignments or requirements\\* will I be performing on a regular basis? What are my deliverables?** 



* You will design software and write code in C\\#, (.net core, .net standard, asp.net)
* You will implement and improve processes around DevOps, Agile, and CI/CD
* You will develop applications using Kafka, micro\\-services, and other cloud design patterns
* You care and have strong RESTful API design, including API versioning, backwards compatibility, authentication and rate limiting.



  





**What will you bring to Omnissa? (List required / preferred skills)** 



* *Bachelor’s or master’s degree in Computer Science or related field*
* *Proficiency with C\\# \\& .NET Framework. (Minimum 8 years experience)*
* *Experience with object\\-oriented design and multi\\-threaded programming*
* *Excellent debugging and troubleshooting skills \\& log analysis for troubleshooting.*
* *Demonstrable knowledge of large\\-scale deployments in enterprise technology environments.*
* *In depth knowledge on cloud computing*
* *Ability to write quality code, unit tests, integration tests using mocking/instrumentation.*
* *A high degree of “ownership” \\- the ability to determine what needs to be done and make it happen*
* *Security and compliance consciousness*
* *Experience with developing automated tests, such as unit tests, integration test and end to end test*

description:

 We are hiring for one of our clients, seeking a Software Engineer (Human Data Platforms) to work on a contractual basis.  • Design and implement scalable backend systems for processing structured and unstructured human data at scale.

 • Knowledge of cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, or Azure) and containerization tools like Docker and Kubernetes.

title: iOS Software Engineer (Remote)
description:
* **Role** 
 : iOS Software Engineer (Remote)
* **Location** 
 : Remote (Work from Anywhere)
* **Payout:** 
 $30 \\- $90 /hour



  





**Role Overview:** 




 We are hiring for one of our clients, seeking an iOS Developer to work on a contractor basis. The client is building a platform that connects domain experts to the development of frontier AI models. Your expertise will directly shape how models learn, reason, and perform through high\\-quality, real\\-world input. This work spans domains including finance, healthcare, engineering, and more, providing a unique opportunity to contribute to meaningful advancements in AI. The role is ideal for developers with strong iOS development skills who want to apply their craft to cutting\\-edge technology.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities:** 




 • Develop, test, and deploy advanced iOS applications using Swift, UIKit, and SwiftUI while adhering to best coding practices.
 



 • Integrate and manage API connections to enable robust data handling and real\\-time app functionality.
 



 • Collaborate closely with cross\\-functional teams including designers, product managers, and backend developers to deliver cohesive and innovative app features.
 



 • Optimize application performance to ensure speed, responsiveness, and reliability across all supported devices.
 



 • Implement solid architectural patterns such as MVC to promote scalability and maintainability of the codebase.
 



 • Ensure secure and efficient data handling throughout the application lifecycle.
 



  





**Required Skills \\& Qualifications:** 




 • Proficiency in Swift programming with a strong understanding of its ecosystem and best practices.
 



 • Experience developing user interfaces using UIKit and SwiftUI, with attention to responsive design and accessibility.
 



 • Knowledge of API integration and networking, including handling JSON/XML data and implementing RESTful or GraphQL services.
 



 • Familiarity with architectural patterns such as MVC and an ability to write clean, maintainable, and scalable code.
 



 • Experience with performance optimization techniques for iOS applications to ensure smooth user experience.
 



 • Understanding of secure coding practices and data protection principles in mobile applications.
 



 • Ability to work independently in a remote environment while maintaining clear communication and collaboration with global teams.
 



  





**More About the Opportunity:** 




 This role offers the chance to contribute to a platform enabling 1 billion people to do meaningful work by applying their expertise to AI. The client, backed by over $40 million in funding, uses an AI\\-powered recruiter to match top talent with high\\-impact projects. You’ll join a global network of experts contributing to the human intelligence layer that trains and evaluates advanced AI models, gaining exposure to frontier AI development across multiple domains.
 



  





**Equal Opportunity Employer:**
